# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The project is currently maintained on the latest `main` branch and the most recent release.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.

Use GitHub private vulnerability reporting for this repository to disclose vulnerabilities privately.

Include:
- a clear description of the issue
- steps to reproduce it
- potential impact
- any suggested fix or mitigation

## Response Expectations

I will try to acknowledge valid reports within a reasonable time and work on a fix before any public disclosure when possible.
